title: Scale CloudNative-PG to 3 instances, enable PgBouncer, configure daily backups
subtasks: Update CloudNative-PG Cluster CR to spec.instances: 3.
Deploy PgBouncer as a sidecar or separate deployment for connection pooling, configuring services to use it.
Configure daily automated full backups of PostgreSQL to Cloudflare R2.

title: Enable Valkey Sentinel with 3 replicas and configure maxmemory policy
subtasks: Update Opstree Redis CR to deploy a 3-node Sentinel-managed cluster.
Configure maxmemory policy (e.g., allkeys-lru) and maxmemory-samples for each Valkey instance.
Update service configurations to connect to the Sentinel cluster for high availability.

title: Implement internal mTLS for service-to-service communication using cert-manager
subtasks: Configure a ClusterIssuer (e.g., self-signed or integrate with an existing CA).
Generate TLS certificates for each service (e.g., equipment-catalog-svc, rms-svc) via cert-manager.
Configure application-level TLS or a service mesh (if deployed) to enforce mTLS using these certificates.

title: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector and Jaeger for distributed tracing
subtasks: Deploy OpenTelemetry Collector as a DaemonSet or Deployment to receive traces.
Configure OTel Collector with appropriate sampling rates (e.g., head-based sampling).
Deploy Jaeger (Collector, Query, UI) with persistent storage for trace data.
Instrument all backend services (Rust, Go, Node.js) to export traces to the OTel Collector.
